description: Multi-stage automated reminder sequence for overdue invoices with escalating tone, optional late fees, and owner alerts

trigger.description: Runs daily to check for invoices past due date and trigger reminders based on schedule

workflow_steps.description: Cron job checks all invoices for overdue status
Find invoices past due date that haven't been paid
Determine which stage of reminder to send (1, 7, 14, 30 days)
Send reminder with tone appropriate to stage (gentle → firm → urgent → final)
Apply late fee if configured and appropriate
Monitor if customer makes payment after reminder
Notify business owner at each escalation stage
Pause reminders if customer makes partial payment
At day 30, send final notice with collections escalation option

reminder_schedule_days.description: Array of days after due date to send reminders [Day 1 gentle, Day 7 firm, Day 14 urgent, Day 30 final]

channels_per_stage.description: Channels to use for each reminder stage

apply_late_fee.description: Apply late fees to overdue invoices

late_fee_amount_or_percent.description: Late fee as amount (e.g., '25') or percentage (e.g., '2%')

pause_on_partial_payment.description: Pause reminder sequence if customer makes partial payment

escalate_to_owner_at_stage.description: Stage at which to alert business owner (1-4)

max_reminders.description: Maximum number of reminders per invoice

quiet_hours_enabled.description: Don't send reminders outside business hours

quiet_hours_start.description: Start time for quiet hours (24-hour format)

quiet_hours_end.description: End time for quiet hours (24-hour format)

collections_agency_threshold_days.description: Days overdue before suggesting collections agency escalation

owner_alert_email.description: Email address to send owner alerts to

stage_1_gentle.description: Friendly reminder with benefit of the doubt

stage_2_firm.description: More assertive reminder with consequences mentioned

stage_3_urgent.description: Strong reminder with payment terms and consequences

stage_4_final.description: Final notice with collections escalation or legal action mention

reminder_stage_1.name: Gentle Reminder (Day 1)
reminder_stage_1.subject: Just a heads up: Invoice {{invoice_number}} payment due

reminder_stage_4.name: Final Notice (Day 30)
reminder_stage_4.subject: FINAL NOTICE: Invoice {{invoice_number}} legal action pending

owner_alert_email.name: Owner Alert Email
owner_alert_email.subject: Alert: Invoice {{invoice_number}} from {{customer_name}} is overdue
owner_alert_email.description: Alert to business owner about overdue invoice

payment_received_after_reminder.name: Payment Received Confirmation
payment_received_after_reminder.subject: Thank you! Payment received for Invoice {{invoice_number}}
payment_received_after_reminder.description: Confirmation after payment received following reminder

compliance.fdcpa_description: Module is not debt collection; sends reminders for business-to-business unpaid invoices, not consumer debt collection
compliance.not_third_party_debt_collection: Reminders only sent by original creditor, not debt collectors

scenarios: Daily cron job runs and detects overdue invoices
Stage 1 gentle reminder sent at day 1 overdue
Stage 2 firm reminder sent at day 7 overdue
Stage 3 urgent reminder sent at day 14 overdue
Stage 4 final notice sent at day 30 overdue
Escalating tone matches stage expectations
Email reminder sent for each stage
SMS reminder sent starting at stage 2
Late fee applied when enabled
Late fee amount calculated correctly (fixed or percent)
Owner alert sent at configured stage
Owner alert contains correct invoice data
Reminder paused after partial payment received
Reminder resume after remaining balance unpaid
Max reminders limit respected
Payment received webhook cancels follow-up reminders
Quiet hours respected (no sends outside hours)
Collections escalation triggered at threshold
Multi-channel (email + SMS) both sent for later stages
CRM timeline updated with reminder events
